# dcmi\_get\_soc\_sensor\_info<a name="EN-US_TOPIC_0000002515510522"></a>

**Prototype<a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_toc533412077"></a>**

**int dcmi\_get\_soc\_sensor\_info\(int card\_id, int device\_id, int sensor\_id, union tag\_sensor\_info \*sensor\_info\)**

**Description<a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_toc533412078"></a>**

Obtains the sensor information of a device.

<div class="note" id="note102181227171418"><a name="note102181227171418"></a><a name="note102181227171418"></a><span class="notetitle"> NOTE: </span><div class="notebody"><p id="en-us_topic_0000002515350528_p10218227151413"><a name="en-us_topic_0000002515350528_p10218227151413"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000002515350528_p10218227151413"></a>The value of <strong id="en-us_topic_0000002515350528_b551771083414"><a name="en-us_topic_0000002515350528_b551771083414"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000002515350528_b551771083414"></a>device_id_max</strong> is <strong id="en-us_topic_0000002515350528_b1263401315345"><a name="en-us_topic_0000002515350528_b1263401315345"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000002515350528_b1263401315345"></a>2</strong>. </div></div>

<p id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p198819103113"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p198819103113"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p198819103113"></a><strong id="b25538717942951"><a name="b25538717942951"></a><a name="b25538717942951"></a>0</strong>: <strong id="b168060724242951"><a name="b168060724242951"></a><a name="b168060724242951"></a>DCMI_CLUSTER_TEMP_ID</strong>, indicating the cluster temperature. The return value is of the <strong id="b46897159342951"><a name="b46897159342951"></a><a name="b46897159342951"></a>uchar</strong> type.</p>
<p id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p1298861173110"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p1298861173110"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p1298861173110"></a><strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b964511121565"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b964511121565"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b964511121565"></a>1</strong>: <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b66451912125618"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b66451912125618"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b66451912125618"></a>DCMI_PERI_TEMP_ID</strong>, indicating the PERI temperature. The return value is of the <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b14646612185612"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b14646612185612"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b14646612185612"></a>uchar</strong> type.</p>
<p id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p12988151163118"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p12988151163118"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p12988151163118"></a><strong id="b68142103042954"><a name="b68142103042954"></a><a name="b68142103042954"></a>2</strong>: <strong id="b204171474642954"><a name="b204171474642954"></a><a name="b204171474642954"></a>DCMI_AICORE0_TEMP_ID</strong>, indicating the AI Core 0 temperature. The return value is of the <strong id="b165165163042954"><a name="b165165163042954"></a><a name="b165165163042954"></a>uchar</strong> type.</p>
<p id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p1498861173113"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p1498861173113"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p1498861173113"></a><strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b2297614175618"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b2297614175618"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b2297614175618"></a>3</strong>: <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b129761411565"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b129761411565"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b129761411565"></a>DCMI_AICORE1_TEMP_ID</strong>, indicating the AI Core 1 temperature. The return value is of the <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b1229721414569"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b1229721414569"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b1229721414569"></a>uchar</strong> type.</p>
<p id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p998810116317"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p998810116317"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p998810116317"></a><strong id="b27887958042956"><a name="b27887958042956"></a><a name="b27887958042956"></a>4</strong>: <strong id="b213234277042956"><a name="b213234277042956"></a><a name="b213234277042956"></a>DCMI_AICORE_LIMIT_ID</strong>. The return value is of the <strong id="b71346609642956"><a name="b71346609642956"></a><a name="b71346609642956"></a>uchar</strong> type, where <strong id="b189036220542956"><a name="b189036220542956"></a><a name="b189036220542956"></a>0</strong> indicates limited and <strong id="b43957597742956"><a name="b43957597742956"></a><a name="b43957597742956"></a>1</strong> indicates unlimited.</p>
<p id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p29884133112"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p29884133112"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p29884133112"></a><strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b15193121605619"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b15193121605619"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b15193121605619"></a>5</strong>: <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b1193131665618"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b1193131665618"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b1193131665618"></a>DCMI_AICORE_TOTAL_PER_ID</strong>, indicating the total AI Core pulse period. The return value is of the <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b181949164565"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b181949164565"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b181949164565"></a>uchar</strong> type.</p>
<p id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p398841113120"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p398841113120"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p398841113120"></a><strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b1593211313151"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b1593211313151"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b1593211313151"></a>6</strong>: <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b10932113171518"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b10932113171518"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b10932113171518"></a>DCMI_AICORE_ELIM_PER_ID</strong>, indicating the AI Core eliminating period. The return value is of the <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b593201341516"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b593201341516"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b593201341516"></a>uchar</strong> type.</p>
<p id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p119882193110"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p119882193110"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p119882193110"></a><strong id="b1790243153014"><a name="b1790243153014"></a><a name="b1790243153014"></a>7</strong>: <strong id="b57907430301"><a name="b57907430301"></a><a name="b57907430301"></a>DCMI_AICORE_BASE_FREQ_ID</strong>, indicating the AI Core reference frequency (MHz). The return value is of the <strong id="b379064314302"><a name="b379064314302"></a><a name="b379064314302"></a>ushort</strong> type.</p>
<p id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p19988131163113"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p19988131163113"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p19988131163113"></a><strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b109449185562"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b109449185562"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b109449185562"></a>8</strong>: <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b99446185566"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b99446185566"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b99446185566"></a>DCMI_NPU_DDR_FREQ_ID</strong>, indicating the DDR frequency (MHz). The return value is of the <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b20944418205615"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b20944418205615"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b20944418205615"></a>ushort</strong> type.</p>
<p id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p139886119313"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p139886119313"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p139886119313"></a><strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b576161915610"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b576161915610"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b576161915610"></a>9</strong>: <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b97621919185618"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b97621919185618"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b97621919185618"></a>DCMI_THERMAL_THRESHOLD_ID</strong>. The return value is of the <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b976215192565"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b976215192565"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b976215192565"></a>temp[2]</strong> type. <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b1976213198565"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b1976213198565"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b1976213198565"></a>temp[0]</strong> indicates the frequency limit temperature for temperature saturation, and <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b16762419185613"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b16762419185613"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b16762419185613"></a>temp[1]</strong> indicates the system reset temperature.</p>
<p id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p169881914318"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p169881914318"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p169881914318"></a><strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b1770542015567"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b1770542015567"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b1770542015567"></a>10</strong>: <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b0705162010568"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b0705162010568"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b0705162010568"></a>DCMI_NTC_TEMP_ID</strong>. The return value is of the <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b107051120165615"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b107051120165615"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b107051120165615"></a>ntc_tmp[4]</strong> type. <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b9706122005616"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b9706122005616"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b9706122005616"></a>ntc_tmp[0]</strong>, <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b20706132005613"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b20706132005613"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b20706132005613"></a>ntc_tmp[1]</strong>, <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b1170617203562"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b1170617203562"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b1170617203562"></a>ntc_tmp[2]</strong>, and <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b1970742011566"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b1970742011566"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b1970742011566"></a>ntc_tmp[3]</strong> correspond to the temperature of four thermistors, respectively.</p>
<p id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p99886118317"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p99886118317"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p99886118317"></a><strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b23855216561"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b23855216561"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b23855216561"></a>11</strong>: <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b93851218569"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b93851218569"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b93851218569"></a>DCMI_SOC_TEMP_ID</strong>, indicating the highest SoC temperature. The return value is of the <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b63861121135619"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b63861121135619"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b63861121135619"></a>uchar</strong> type.</p>
<p id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p5988016310"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p5988016310"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p5988016310"></a><strong id="b86366196742958"><a name="b86366196742958"></a><a name="b86366196742958"></a>12</strong>: <strong id="b30392879242958"><a name="b30392879242958"></a><a name="b30392879242958"></a>DCMI_FP_TEMP_ID</strong>, indicating the highest temperature of the optical module. The return value is of the <strong id="b123512519742958"><a name="b123512519742958"></a><a name="b123512519742958"></a>signed int iint</strong> type.</p>
<p id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p698815115312"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p698815115312"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p698815115312"></a><strong id="b17408501634302"><a name="b17408501634302"></a><a name="b17408501634302"></a>13</strong>: <strong id="b6868347304302"><a name="b6868347304302"></a><a name="b6868347304302"></a>DCMI_N_DIE_TEMP_ID</strong>, indicating the N_DIE temperature. The return value is of the <strong id="b16996474504302"><a name="b16996474504302"></a><a name="b16996474504302"></a>signed int iint</strong> type.</p>
<p id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p1898816193112"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p1898816193112"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p1898816193112"></a><strong id="b13013108924307"><a name="b13013108924307"></a><a name="b13013108924307"></a>14</strong>: <strong id="b18658771084307"><a name="b18658771084307"></a><a name="b18658771084307"></a>DCMI_HBM_TEMP_ID</strong>, indicating the highest temperature of on-chip memory. The return value is of the <strong id="b12573386424307"><a name="b12573386424307"></a><a name="b12573386424307"></a>signed int iint</strong> type.</p>
<p id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p31089182199"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p31089182199"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p31089182199"></a><strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b1865519260567"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b1865519260567"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b1865519260567"></a>11</strong> to <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b3655112695611"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b3655112695611"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b3655112695611"></a>14</strong> are supported in this scenario.</p>
<div class="note" id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_note3722171515"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_note3722171515"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_note3722171515"></a><span class="notetitle"> NOTE: </span><div class="notebody"><p id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p44421721202418"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p44421721202418"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p44421721202418"></a>DCMI_FP_TEMP_ID:</p>
<a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_ul18432021162417"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_ul18432021162417"></a><ul id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_ul18432021162417"><li>If no optical module is installed, error code <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b298371510414"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b298371510414"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b298371510414"></a>-8008</strong> is returned.</li><li>If an optical module is installed, the normal temperature is displayed.</li><li>If a copper cable is inserted and the temperature cannot be queried, <strong id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b1895517171849"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b1895517171849"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_b1895517171849"></a>0x7EFF</strong> is returned.</li></ul>
</div></div>
</td>
</tr>
<tr id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_row677353102819"><td class="cellrowborder" valign="top" width="17%" headers="mcps1.1.5.1.1 "><p id="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p347295412284"><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p347295412284"></a><a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_p347295412284"></a>sensor_info</p>

**Example<a name="en-us_topic_0000001206147256_en-us_topic_0000001223172959_en-us_topic_0000001101799418_toc533412083"></a>**

```c
...
int ret = 0;
int card_id = 0x3;
int device_id = 0;
union tag_sensor_info sensor_info = {0};
int sensor_id = 1;
ret = dcmi_get_soc_sensor_info(card_id, device_id, sensor_id, &sensor_info);
if (ret != 0){
    // todo: Record logs.
    return ret;
}
...
```
